response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack software developer with a broad web, mobile, and embedded background, but has virtually no overlap with the core requirements of a Principal Performance Architect focused on SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware-software co-design, or deep-learning workload optimization. His closest adjacent experience — low-latency application tuning at Sociomantic and AI-agent tooling at re:cinq — operates entirely at the software layer and does not demonstrate the hardware architecture or deep-learning performance analysis depth this role demands.
strengths: Demonstrated performance awareness in high-throughput, low-latency environments (millions of HTTP req/s at Sociomantic using async I/O and fibers)
Long career spanning embedded systems, robotic arms, and system-level tooling, showing some hardware-adjacent exposure
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) indicates familiarity with applied AI ecosystem
concerns: Zero experience with SoC or IP modeling, which is a non-negotiable core responsibility of the role
No background in deep neural network training, inference optimization, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD — none of the preferred qualifications are met
Skill set is dominated by web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, React) with no indication of hardware-software co-design or system architecture at the silicon level
